subject: A humanoid figure in casual modern clothing swings a pole weapon while being grappled at the legs by a large dark organic creature with a gaping mouth and elongated claws; both appear to be falling or plunging together
description: A humanoid figure with short hair, wearing a jacket with a bright yellow-green collar accent and casual trousers, swings a long pole-like weapon upward with both hands. Their body is being seized around the legs by a massive dark creature composed of writhing organic matter — root-like tendrils, elongated clawed arms, and a wide gaping maw with glowing red eyes. The creature is large and partially rising from a ruined surface. The two figures are locked together in a mutual downward plunge, the human fighting back even as they are dragged. The background is flooded with deep red-orange light filtered through decayed organic structures. Debris is scattered around the mid-ground. The mood is desperate last-stand action.
foreground: Humanoid in modern jacket with pole weapon grappled by a dark clawed organic monster
background: Ruined environment bathed in deep red-orange glow, decayed organic structures
emotion: desperate defiance; the human figure's posture is aggressive and committed even in the grip of the creature
